title: malva micans subsp. pallescens
intro: Malva micans subsp. pallescens, also known as the pale mallow, is a subspecies of the Malva micans plant, belonging to the family Malvaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Malva micans subsp. pallescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
